# registerGetCoffeesTool()

> **Service Layer**

```ts
function registerGetCoffeesTool(server: McpServer, runtime: ManagedRuntime<GetCoffeesService, unknown>): void;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service.ts:87](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service.ts#L87)

Registers the `get-coffees` MCP tool on the given server.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                                                       | Description                                                                                                                              |
| --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | [`McpServer`](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk)                                                      | The [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) instance to register on.                                         |
| `runtime` | [`ManagedRuntime`](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/)<[`GetCoffeesService`](../classes/GetCoffeesService.md), `unknown`> | A [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) whose environment includes [GetCoffeesService](../classes/GetCoffeesService.md). |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Wiring steps:

1. Calls [McpServer.registerTool](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) with tool name
   `"get-coffees"` and a description (no `inputSchema` — the
   tool accepts no arguments).
2. In the async handler, delegates to
   [executeFormatted](../classes/GetCoffeesService.md#property-executeformatted)
   inside the provided [ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/).
